div.style: position: relative; width: 100%; height: 100%; min-height: 600px; background: #f8f9fa;

iframe.style: width: 100%; height: 100%; min-height: 600px; border: 0; display: block;
iframe.allow: clipboard-read; clipboard-write; fullscreen; microphone; camera; xr-spatial-tracking
iframe.title: NEVVA Planner
